description: Before a new plumbing subcontractor can start work, the contract manager must verify they have submitted a valid certificate of insurance (COI).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the subcontractor's file from the vendor management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The plumbing subcontractor's file is opened.

nodes.task_description: Check for an uploaded Certificate of Insurance and verify its expiration date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the COI and confirms it is valid for the duration of the project.

nodes.task_description: Update the subcontractor's status to 'Cleared to Start Work'.

expected_outcome.expected: The subcontractor is approved to begin work on site.
